## keybindings {#keybindings}

[brave clojure](https://www.braveclojure.com/basic-emacs/)

### parens 관련 {#parens-관련}

lisp like languages need to special key bindings for handling parens(able to do Evil Safe Structural Editing)
[evil-cleverparens](https://github.com/luxbock/evil-cleverparens)


### clojure 관련 {#clojure-관련}

| Keys        | Description                                                                        |
|-------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| C-c M-n M-n | Switch to namespace of current buffer.                                             |
| C-x C-e     | Evaluate expression immediately preceding point.                                   |
| C-c C-k     | Compile current buffer.                                                            |
| C-c C-d C-d | Display documentation for symbol under point.                                      |
| M-. and M-, | Navigate to source code for symbol under point and return to your original buffer. |
| C-c C-d C-a | Apropros search; find arbitrary text across function names and documentation.      |


## 용어 관련 {#용어-관련}

| 용어                 | 단축키 | 설명                                               |
|--------------------|-----|--------------------------------------------------|
| create regions       | C-spc | select regions, similar to visual selection of vim |
| kill &amp; kill ring |       | M-y가 kill ring을 보여준다.  fuzzy하게 검색도 가능 |


## FP(faced problems) {#fp--faced-problems}

1.  [table row의 content가 너무 길 때 wrap하는법](https://emacs.stackexchange.com/questions/38135/wrap-cell-content-in-an-org-mode-table)
    -   table 만들고 org table =&gt; table.el로 만들고
    -   C-'로 table 편집 진입
    -   col을 narrow한다.
    -   spc-u(universal argument) 100(times) m-x narrow(make col narrower) enter
